title: rhel-system-roles bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for Oracle Linux is now available for Oracle Linux 10.
description:
[1.108.6-0.1.0.1]
- Replace bug reporting url [Orabug: 34202300]
- Replace upstream references from description tag [OLDIS-1810]
- Replace upstream URLs from galaxy_transform.py command in spec file
- Remove comments which confuse ruamel
- Replace upstream reference of Ansible Collection in spec file [Orabug: 32904501]

[1.108.6-0.1]
- Resolves: RHEL-107013 : bootloader - fix: boolean values and null values are not allowed
- This fixes ha_cluster tests

[1.108.5-0.1]
- Resolves: RHEL-107013 : bootloader - fix: boolean values and null values are not allowed
- This fixes tests in certificate, ha_cluster, kdump, selinux

[1.108.4-0.1]
- Resolves: RHEL-107013 : bootloader - fix: boolean values and null values are not allowed
- no actual code changes, test fixes for bootloader, ha_cluster, kdump, tlog

[1.108.3-0.1]
- Resolves: RHEL-107013 : bootloader - fix: boolean values and null values are not allowed
- add bootloader test for this fix

[1.108.2-0.1]
- Resolves: RHEL-107047 : sshd - fix: New configuration option in CentOS 10

[1.108.1-0.1]
- Resolves: RHEL-107013 : bootloader - fix: boolean values and null values are not allowed
- Resolves: RHEL-95719 : storage - Tests verification fails on encrypted LVM on top of MD RAID
- Resolves: RHEL-106261 : sudo - redhat.rhel_system_roles.sudo takes 6-7 hours to scan /etc/sudoers.d
- fix storage role tests related to encrypted LVM on top of MD RAID and el7 raid errors
- fix postfix role tests related to rebooting
- fix ha_cluster role tests related to missing fence agent
- add firewall test debugging for interface tests

[1.108.0-0.1]
- Resolves: RHEL-101724 : metrics - [RFE] Allow defining enabled PCP PMDAs with the metrics role

[1.107.0-0.1]
- Resolves: RHEL-105093 : podman - specifying multiple users causes resources to be associated with wrong user
- Resolves: RHEL-95757 : storage - Improve error reporting when invalid or unsupported RAID configuration is given
- Resolves: RHEL-95729 : storage - [RHEL10] Incorrect key file in crypttab entry for volume encrypted_vol
- refactor ha_cluster to have empty __init__.py in module_utils for ansible-test
- fix tests in postfix, selinux

[1.106.1-0.1]
- Resolves: RHEL-103887 : postfix - fix: configure postfix to listen only to IPv4 if IPv6 is disabled
- Resolves: RHEL-103573 : selinux - fix: tempdir path not defined in check mode; __selinux_item.path may be undefined
- ha_cluster - ansible 2.19 support
- bootloader - fix wording in README
full_text:
[1.108.6-0.1.0.1]
- Replace bug reporting url [Orabug: 34202300]
- Replace upstream references from description tag [OLDIS-1810]
- Replace upstream URLs from galaxy_transform.py command in spec file
- Remove comments which confuse ruamel
- Replace upstream reference of Ansible Collection in spec file [Orabug: 32904501]

[1.108.6-0.1]
- Resolves: RHEL-107013 : bootloader - fix: boolean values and null values are not allowed
- This fixes ha_cluster tests

[1.108.5-0.1]
- Resolves: RHEL-107013 : bootloader - fix: boolean values and null values are not allowed
- This fixes tests in certificate, ha_cluster, kdump, selinux

[1.108.4-0.1]
- Resolves: RHEL-107013 : bootloader - fix: boolean values and null values are not allowed
- no actual code changes, test fixes for bootloader, ha_cluster, kdump, tlog

[1.108.3-0.1]
- Resolves: RHEL-107013 : bootloader - fix: boolean values and null values are not allowed
- add bootloader test for this fix

[1.108.2-0.1]
- Resolves: RHEL-107047 : sshd - fix: New configuration option in CentOS 10

[1.108.1-0.1]
- Resolves: RHEL-107013 : bootloader - fix: boolean values and null values are not allowed
- Resolves: RHEL-95719 : storage - Tests verification fails on encrypted LVM on top of MD RAID
- Resolves: RHEL-106261 : sudo - redhat.rhel_system_roles.sudo takes 6-7 hours to scan /etc/sudoers.d
- fix storage role tests related to encrypted LVM on top of MD RAID and el7 raid errors
- fix postfix role tests related to rebooting
- fix ha_cluster role tests related to missing fence agent
- add firewall test debugging for interface tests

[1.108.0-0.1]
- Resolves: RHEL-101724 : metrics - [RFE] Allow defining enabled PCP PMDAs with the metrics role

[1.107.0-0.1]
- Resolves: RHEL-105093 : podman - specifying multiple users causes resources to be associated with wrong user
- Resolves: RHEL-95757 : storage - Improve error reporting when invalid or unsupported RAID configuration is given
- Resolves: RHEL-95729 : storage - [RHEL10] Incorrect key file in crypttab entry for volume encrypted_vol
- refactor ha_cluster to have empty __init__.py in module_utils for ansible-test
- fix tests in postfix, selinux

[1.106.1-0.1]
- Resolves: RHEL-103887 : postfix - fix: configure postfix to listen only to IPv4 if IPv6 is disabled
- Resolves: RHEL-103573 : selinux - fix: tempdir path not defined in check mode; __selinux_item.path may be undefined
- ha_cluster - ansible 2.19 support
- bootloader - fix wording in README

References:
https://linux.oracle.com/errata/ELEA-2025-20348-0.html
